title: Death and Rebirth special
wikitext:
[]: Death and Rebirth special             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Fri May 10, 2013 6:57 pm The subtitles are in [s]Spanish[/s] Portuguese, but I came across a special that's at the premiere of Death & Rebirth. If nothing else, it'll give an idea on how Japanese TV saw the show back in the late 90s.

[]:             Quote Post by Alpha » Fri May 10, 2013 7:02 pm Heh, that's portuguese, amigo

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Fri May 10, 2013 7:04 pm Alpha wrote: Heh, that's portuguese, amigo

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri May 10, 2013 7:26 pm Part 2 here: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QUMZweUvSIE

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Sat May 11, 2013 4:04 am Could anybody who understands either Japanese or Portuguese tell us, if this is just advertisement, or if there is some interesting insights in one of those videos? I would be very grateful, if somebody could.

[]:             Quote Post by Atropos » Sat May 11, 2013 9:40 am This is just awesome. Unfortunately, I have to rely on my terrible Portugese to understand it. ...how'd the uploader even find it?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat May 11, 2013 7:25 pm Atropos wrote: ...how'd the uploader even find it?

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sun May 12, 2013 7:24 pm robersora wrote: Could anybody who understands either Japanese or Portuguese tell us, if this is just advertisement, or if there is some interesting insights in one of those videos? I would be very grateful, if somebody could.

[]:             Quote Post by Justacrazyguy » Mon May 13, 2013 6:00 pm The word commitment isn´t part of our work.

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Tue May 14, 2013 2:30 am Justacrazyguy wrote: Wow, so much time and so little things worth watching.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Tue May 14, 2013 3:16 am Dream wrote: EDIT: Also, i don't know if it's because i'm south american, but i can understand the video just fine on most words.

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Tue May 14, 2013 3:25 am robersora wrote: So please, please tell me! :3

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Tue May 14, 2013 4:06 am ^ Thank you very much!
